founding_process: Accumulated goodness and merit for decades, virtue reached the people, administered affairs, tested by heaven before taking the throne
Xie practiced benevolence and righteousness for over 10 generations; 800 feudal lords met at Mengjin without prior arrangement
Hou Ji practiced benevolence and righteousness for over 10 generations; 800 feudal lords met at Mengjin
Rose from Duke Xiang, flourished under Dukes Wen and Mu, after Dukes Xian and Xiao gradually annexed six states; over 100 years to unification under First Emperor
